code_boss.description: Code Boss is a special boss event in Season 2. Three separate bosses appear (Missiles, Tank, Air type). Use S1 squad only. 3 attacks per boss = 9 total attacks per event day.
code_boss.note: Hit ONLY with your S1 squad throughout the entire event.
pre_battle_checklist: Scout another player first to activate the scouting buff
Equip boss-specific drone chip set directly from your base (not default set)
Equip Mushroom Skin if you have it - provides +5% Code Boss damage
Ask alliance teammates to warm your base to 70°C for damage bonus
Switch to correct equipment set for boss type
Collect rewards after each boss is defeated

meta_formations.note: Marshall and Mason in squad often outperform a full mono-type formation bonus - do not underestimate support heroes. If your Air or Missile squad is weak, keep Kim/Stetman/Mason in the back and put 2 strong attackers in front instead.

variant_strategy.when_to_use: When your Air or Missile squad is significantly weaker than your Tank squad
variant_strategy.approach: Keep Kim + Stetman + Mason in back row for universal damage support, place your 2 strongest available attackers in front regardless of type
variant_strategy.reasoning: Hybrid support cores can outperform a full mono-type formation in practice

damage_boosters: Mushroom Skin base skin: +5% Code Boss damage
Base temperature at 70°C: damage bonus from heat
Scouting buff: scout any player before attacking
Correct drone chip set equipped for boss type

season_2_schedule.note: 3 Code Boss events during Season 2. Final event occurs during ULTIME FIGHT week alongside Arms Race and SVS content.
